message.subject: Re: Your project chatwoot-crm-platform has been shut down

message.plain_text_body:
Hi there,

Thanks for reaching out about MarianneAI. We appreciate your message.

Our team is currently handling many public-data requests, so the automatic answer service is temporarily busy. Your request is captured and will be handled manually.

Current status: No ANSWER_ENDPOINT_URL configured. Sending temporary busy response.

Please try again in a few minutes, and we will respond properly.

If this is urgent, resend with subject [urgent] and we will keep the ticket open.

Kind regards,
MarianneAI Support

classification.reasoning: The email appears to be an automated system loop or error notification indicating an operational failure, specifically a missing ANSWER_ENDPOINT_URL and a shut down CRM platform within MarianneAI's support infrastructure.

intent.task_title: Investigate CRM shutdown and missing ANSWER_ENDPOINT_URL
intent.intent_summary: An automated system alert or email loop indicating that the 'chatwoot-crm-platform' project has been shut down, which triggered a fallback response revealing a missing 'ANSWER_ENDPOINT_URL' configuration in the support system.
intent.requested_outcome: Restore the chatwoot-crm-platform infrastructure and configure the missing ANSWER_ENDPOINT_URL to fix the auto-responder functionality.
intent.task_description: Investigate the downtime/shutdown of the 'chatwoot-crm-platform' project. Additionally, update the system configuration to include a valid 'ANSWER_ENDPOINT_URL' to prevent the temporary busy fallback message and potential infinite email loops.
missing_information: Root cause of the chatwoot-crm-platform shutdown
The correct ANSWER_ENDPOINT_URL to be configured

assessment.rationale: The email acts as a clear, actionable infrastructure alert regarding a shut down project and a missing environment variable. It contains sufficient technical context to route directly to engineering for investigation and resolution.
missing_information: Root cause of the chatwoot-crm-platform shutdown
The correct ANSWER_ENDPOINT_URL to be configured
